summary: Iteration 37: Phase 3 QA - Multi-Campus Data Seeding and Bug Fixes VERIFIED. All 6 demo logins working. Admin dashboard shows tenant-specific stats (20K Abundant East, 18K Downtown, 12K West). All 3 bug fixes confirmed: (A) Kids checkin shows 5 checked-in children, (B) Geofence returns valid lat/lng coordinates, (C) Member My Groups returns 3 groups. Platform admin sees all 5 tenants with correct member counts. Tenant isolation verified.

console_warnings.issue: Chart width/height warnings on dashboard - cosmetic only, charts render correctly
React hydration warning about span inside tbody - cosmetic dev-mode warning only

verified: Abundant East: 20K members, $125,000 MTD giving, 12K active members
Platform Admin sees: 20,000 Abundant East, 18,000 Downtown, 12,000 West members
Kids Check-in Station shows 5 children checked in
Children displayed: Logan Davis, Mateo Anderson, Sophia Rodriguez, Sebastian Lee, Olivia Williams
Pickup codes, allergy badges (Peanuts, Gluten), and Check Out buttons all functional
Returns valid config with zones array
Zone: Main Campus at lat=31.7619, lng=-106.4850, radius=150m
Coordinates are valid (-90 <= lat <= 90, -180 <= lng <= 180)
Returns 3 groups for member@abundant.church
Groups: Saturday Service Team, Parents of Teens, Tuesday Night Worship
UI shows MY GROUPS section with Chat and Leave buttons
Platform admin sees 5 tenants total
Cristo Viene: 2 members, Starter plan
Potter's House: 2 members, Growth plan
Abundant East: 20,000 members, Enterprise plan
Abundant Downtown: 18,000 members, Enterprise plan
Abundant West: 12,000 members, Growth plan
Cristo Viene admin sees: 0 members, $0 giving (their own empty data)
Abundant East admin sees: 20,000 members, $125,000 giving (their data)
Tenants are properly isolated

critical_code_review_comments: All API calls use relative paths (/api prefix) - verified in utils.js and authFetch.js
Multi-campus seeding successful: 3 Abundant campuses (East, Downtown, West) with distinct member counts
Dashboard stats come from dashboard_stats_cache collection with boosted demo numbers
Login returns session_token, token, and access_token aliases for compatibility
seed_data_creation: Multi-campus data seeded in Phase 3: abundant-east-001, abundant-downtown-001, abundant-west-001
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 QA complete. All 3 bug fixes verified working: Kids checkin shows children, Geofence returns valid coords, My Groups returns member's groups. All 6 demo logins work. Tenant isolation verified. The old abundant-church-001 tenant was replaced with 3 Abundant campuses. Console warnings about Recharts dimensions and React hydration are cosmetic only.

mocked_apis.note: All authentication, dashboard, portal, kids checkin, geofence, groups endpoints use real MongoDB data
